description_long: This sculpture is a stylized, upright human figure carved from a light-colored stone or concrete material. The figure is depicted with minimal detail, featuring a blocky head, broad shoulders, and a long, tapering body that merges into a rectangular base. On the front of the base, the name 'Ruben Dario' is inscribed, suggesting the subject is the famous poet. The back of the sculpture displays a relief or emblem, possibly a coat of arms or symbolic motif. The surface is rough and matte, with visible textural variations and some discoloration near the base. The overall form is monolithic and solid, with no apparent movable or interactive parts.
description: A monolithic, rough-textured stone sculpture of a stylized human figure with 'Ruben Dario' inscribed on the base. The figure stands upright with minimal detail and a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stylized face, broad shoulders, and the inscription 'Ruben Dario' on the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head and the elongated, tapering body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and a relief or emblem on the lower back of the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head and the straight, unadorned side of the sculpture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a white background.
